classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'CLINICAL STUDY PROTOCOL SYNOPSIS' in the header and the fax subject line states 'Protocol Synopsis -- BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 v1.0'. It provides a condensed summary of trial design, objectives, inclusion/exclusion criteria, and statistics rather than the full protocol.

trial_title: A Phase II, Open-Label, Multicenter Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in Patients with EGFR-Mutant Advanced NSCLC Following Progression on First-Line Osimertinib
indication: EGFR-Mutant Advanced NSCLC Following Progression on First-Line Osimertinib
summary: This is a clinical study protocol synopsis for trial BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, a Phase II open-label, single-arm, multicenter study evaluating BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in 120 patients with EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC who have progressed on first-line osimertinib. The synopsis summarizes the trial design, primary endpoint (ORR per RECIST v1.1), key inclusion/exclusion criteria, and Simon two-stage statistical design. The document was transmitted via fax to Hospital Clinic Barcelona site ES-03 on 16 March 2023.
references_to: full document v1.0 in Veeva Vault
